title: Create Sable Pallets
description: Adds Pallet Blocks for Sable / Aeronautics.
body:
A simple mod that adds 3 different variants of pallets and a fork to scoop them up.
Standart Pallet, A higher pallet and a full block sized pallet.

![Pallets on the "fork"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c24841eb661da12176b7de528cf1cfd59a84367.png)
